2603.24023.title: Schema on the Inside: A Two-Phase Fine-Tuning Method for High-Efficiency Text-to-SQL at Scale
2603.24023.paper_summary: Applying large, proprietary API-based language models to text-to-SQL tasks poses a significant industry challenge: reliance on massive, schema-heavy prompts results in prohibitive per-token API costs and high latency, hindering scalable production deployment. We present a specialized, self-hosted 8B-parameter model designed for a conversational bot in CriQ, a sister app to Dream11, India's largest fantasy sports platform with over 250 million users, that answers user queries about cricket statistics. Our novel two-phase supervised fine-tuning approach enables the model to internalize the entire database schema, eliminating the need for long-context prompts. This reduces input tokens by over 99%, from a 17k-token baseline to fewer than 100, and replaces costly external API calls with efficient local inference. The resulting system achieves 98.4% execution success and 92.5% semantic accuracy, substantially outperforming a prompt-engineered baseline using Google's Gemini Flash 2.0 (95.6% execution, 89.4% semantic accuracy). These results demonstrate a practical path toward high-precision, low-latency text-to-SQL applications using domain-specialized, self-hosted language models in large-scale production environments.
2603.24023.paper_summary_zh: 應用大型專有的基於API的語言模型於文本轉SQL任務面臨著重大的行業挑戰：依賴龐大且結構複雜的提示導致每個標記的API成本高昂且延遲時間長，妨礙了可擴展的生產部署。我們提出了一個專門的、自我託管的8B參數模型，旨在為CriQ中的對話機器人服務，CriQ是印度最大的幻想運動平台Dream11的姊妹應用，擁有超過2.5億用戶，能夠回答用戶關於板球統計的查詢。我們的新型雙階段監督微調方法使模型能夠內化整個數據庫架構，消除了對長上下文提示的需求。這將輸入標記數量減少了超過99%，從17k標記的基線減少到不到100，並用高效的本地推斷取代了昂貴的外部API調用。最終系統實現了98.4%的執行成功率和92.5%的語義準確率，顯著超越了使用Google的Gemini Flash 2.0的提示工程基線（95.6%的執行成功率，89.4%的語義準確率）。這些結果展示了在大規模生產環境中使用領域專門的自我託管語言模型實現高精度、低延遲文本轉SQL應用的實際途徑。
2603.24023.author: Chinmay Soni et.al.
2603.24023.authors: Chinmay Soni, Shivam Chourasia, Gaurav Kumar, Hitesh Kapoor
